values.description: Oracle Fusion Cloud hostname prefix, e.g. ehxk-test. Used to build fusion_base_url.
Oracle Fusion data-center region code (em2, us2, uk2, ap1). Used to build fusion_base_url.
Full Oracle Fusion Cloud base URL. Set this to https://{fusion_hostname}.fa.{fusion_region}.oraclecloud.com
Oracle Fusion Cloud username for HTTP Basic Authentication on all REST calls.
Oracle Fusion Cloud password. NEVER commit to version control.
ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) used to filter items/transactions updated since this date.
Oracle Fusion inventory organization code, e.g. VWH. Used in GET Items, On-Hand Qty, and Inventory Transactions.
Oracle Fusion Management Business Unit name. Used in GET Inventory Organizations to resolve OrgId.
Oracle Fusion item number used in On-Hand Quantity and Available Quantity requests.
Subinventory name (maps to VendHQ outlet name). Used in GET Active Subinventories.
Unit-of-measure display name (e.g. Each, Gram, Liter). Used in GET Units of Measure.
Oracle Fusion AR customer account number used in GET Customer Profile.
Auto-populate this from the CustomerAccountId returned by GET Customer Profile. Used in POST Standard Receipt as CustomerId.
Auto-populate from TransactionNumber returned by POST Create Invoice. Used in POST Apply Receipt to Invoice.
Auto-populate from ReceiptId returned by POST Create Standard Receipt. Used as the path parameter in POST Apply Receipt to Invoice.
Bank account number to look up in GET External Bank Accounts. Returned ExternalBankAccountId is used as RemittanceBankAccountId in receipts.
Oracle Fusion GL ledger ID. Used in POST Import Journal.
